title: Denis O'Connell
compiled_truth: Denis O'Connell is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-19 to 2001-10-22), Denis O'Connell sent 25 and received 149 emails, totalling 174 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (13), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (12), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (7), [Matthew Dawson](people/matthew-dawson) (6), [Jeff Kinneman](people/jeff-kinneman) (5).
